title: Ukraine’s Minister of Defense, a Proponent of Drone Warfare, Is Forced Out
summary: Mykhailo Fedorov announced he was leaving the ministry on Wednesday after conflicts with generals and military contractors over the role of innovative weaponry.

title: Mass Protests Across Ukraine Oppose Ouster of Defense Minister
summary: Demonstrators demanded the reinstatement of Mykhailo Fedorov, who had come to symbolize Ukraine’s success in using drones to strike back against Russia.

title: What to Know About Mykhailo Fedorov, Ukraine’s Ousted Defense Minister
summary: Mr. Fedorov became the youthful face of Ukraine’s successful drone warfare program. The move to replace him has prompted street protests.

title: Wildfire Smoke Turns Skies Orange Across the U.S., and Democrats Make a Big Shift on Israel
summary: Plus, why Gen Z is turning to trade schools.

title: In Iran war, Trump Risks Another American ‘Forever War’
summary: President Trump, who promised to “end wars,” not start them, may have fallen into a familiar presidential trap.

title: Diesel Prices Hit $5 a Gallon Again, Up 33% Since Start of Iran War
summary: U.S. diesel prices first surpassed $5 a gallon in March. Renewed fighting in the Persian Gulf and reduced refinery capacity is once again pushing up prices.

title: Maps Show Where Wildfire Smoke Will Darken Skies on Thursday
summary: Air quality in several cities reached hazardous levels on Thursday morning as smoke is expected to move across North America.

title: Flash Flooding Worsens in Texas After Dozens Are Rescued From Rising Water
summary: The Guadalupe River had surged to potentially catastrophic levels, forecasters warned on Thursday.

title: Trump Administration Argues for Fencing Off Park Next to White House
summary: The Commission of Fine Arts is set to consider the administration’s proposal regarding Lafayette Square Park, which has been the site of numerous protests.

title: The F.D.A. Approves a New Pill to Slash Cholesterol Levels
summary: The new pills can lower cholesterol levels far below what can be achieved with statins, clinical trials have shown.

title: Can a Pro-Israel Democrat Still Win a Big Primary? She’s Going to Try.
summary: To prevail in Michigan’s crucial Senate primary, Representative Haley Stevens will need to overcome Democratic voters’ skepticism of Israel. Pro-Israel groups are spending heavily to help her.

title: Almost Half of House Democrats Vote to End Aid to Israel
summary: The measure failed, but the level of support among Democrats exposed a stark shift in the party away from backing the Jewish state.

title: Investigators Seek Information From Government Officials as Part of Air Force One Leak Investigation
summary: After The New York Times reported on security concerns related to the Qatari-donated jet, the F.B.I. sought to speak with several people who flew aboard the plane with President Trump last week and asked for their phones.

title: Our Top Editor on Subpoenas of Times Journalists
summary: The Trump administration issued subpoenas to reporters who wrote about security concerns involving the new Air Force One. Joe Kahn, the executive editor of The New York Times, responds to what he calls a “naked attempt to intimidate” the newspaper.

title: New York Times Files Motion to Quash Subpoenas of Its Journalists
summary: The Justice Department is seeking to compel grand jury testimony as part of an investigation into Times reporting on the president’s new Air Force One jet.

title: Senators Grill Justice Dept. Officials on New York Times Subpoenas
summary: Democrats questioned the acting attorney general, Todd Blanche, and a U.S. attorney about subpoenas issued to Times journalists who reported on security concerns with the president’s new plane.

title: The Army Veteran Killed Outside His ‘Trump House’
summary: Kerry Sheron could often be found waving and nodding to those who passed his home, which stood out in Escondido, Calif.

title: India Is Moving Fast to Build A.I. Data Centers. A Coastal City May Pay the Price.
summary: With India lagging in the technology, officials are embracing giant data centers. But critics say the megaprojects will use up energy and water, without providing long-term jobs.

title: The Quest for ‘Technological Sovereignty’ in Europe (and Why It’s So Hard)
summary: France and Germany want to quit relying on America and China for key technology like artificial intelligence, but they’re having to choose where to do it.

title: The Hunt for the Counterfeiter Trying to Make the Perfect Bill
summary: On the trail of the world’s best counterfeit artists.

title: Meet Earth’s Newest Monkey. (And Check Out Its Orange Lips.)
summary: It is only the fifth new African monkey identified as a new species in the past 75 years.

title: A Vision of a ‘Society Without Capitalism’
summary: Can democratic socialism redeem the left without destroying capitalism?

title: Teddy’s Place
summary: A visit to the Theodore Roosevelt Presidential Library.

title: Jimmy Fallon Pokes Fun at Joe Biden’s New Memoir
summary: “It’s the second book Biden has written,” Fallon said of the former president. “The first was ‘The Odyssey.’”

title: Sam Neill’s Cause of Death Was Pneumonia, Actor’s Agent Confirms
summary: The beloved New Zealand actor best known for his turn in “Jurassic Park” had “fought and beaten” lymphoma before he fell ill, according to a statement.
